goal: Inspect the workspace, summarize the task, run available tests, and report the results concisely, including any missing files or missing tests if relevant.

steps.reason: Identify the files present and confirm the workspace contents relevant to the task.
Summarize the main task from the brief and note any missing files or gaps in test coverage.
Execute the available tests to determine whether they pass.
Provide a concise final report with the workspace summary, test outcome, and any missing items.

done_when: The workspace contents and task are summarized concisely.
Test results are reported, including pass/fail status and any missing tests/files if applicable.
